property_name: 2 Bedroom Cozy Home In Saint Leon Sur Vezere-1466689

reviews.positive: The location and the garden. Our hosts had been very friendly and helpful. The bought ventilators for the sleeping rooms and one for outside which was very helpful.
reviews.negative: Due to the extrem heat and humidity for about 4 days had there ben very much moskitos and flies. We've got insence-spirals from our host against the moskitos but the flies had been everywhere, especial in the garden and the kitchen. Cooking was a chalenge because of the heat, the humidity and the flies....
